recommendations.title: The Pact II

recommendations.title: The Scary of Sixty-First
recommendations.overview: Two roommates’ lives are upended after finding out that their new Manhattan apartment harbors a dark secret.

recommendations.title: Luckiest Girl Alive
recommendations.overview: A successful woman in New York City finds her life upended when she is forced to confront a dark truth that threatens to unravel her meticulously crafted life.

recommendations.title: No One Will Save You
recommendations.overview: A lonely woman battles extraterrestrials who threaten her future while forcing her to face her past.

recommendations.title: Post Mortem
recommendations.overview: A post mortem photographer and a little girl confront ghosts in a haunted village after the First World War.

recommendations.title: The Vanishing
recommendations.overview: The boyfriend of an abducted woman never gives up the search as the abductor looks on.

recommendations.title: Another Me
recommendations.overview: A teenager finds her perfect life upended when she's stalked by a mysterious doppelganger who has her eyes set on assuming her identity.

recommendations.title: The Infernal Machine
recommendations.overview: Reclusive and controversial author Bruce Cogburn is drawn out of hiding by an obsessive fan, forcing the novelist to confront a past that he thought he could escape, and to account for events set in motion by his bestseller decades earlier. Cogburn's

recommendations.title: In My Father's Den
recommendations.overview: War journalist Paul Prior returns to his New Zealand hometown after his father’s death, rekindling strained relationships with his brother and memories of a troubled past. He befriends Celia, a curious and aspiring writer, who shares a fascination wi

recommendations.title: The Eternal Daughter
recommendations.overview: An artist and her elderly mother confront long-buried secrets when they return to a former family home, now a hotel haunted by its mysterious past.
